scripts.lint: oxlint -c tooling/oxc/base.json core signers formats integrations shared tooling --deny-warnings
scripts.format: oxfmt -c tooling/oxc/oxfmt.json --write core signers formats integrations shared tooling '!**/.cache/**' '!**/node_modules/**' '!**/dist/**' '!**/*.d.ts' '!**/*.tsbuildinfo'
scripts.format:check: oxfmt -c tooling/oxc/oxfmt.json --check core signers formats integrations shared tooling '!**/.cache/**' '!**/node_modules/**' '!**/dist/**' '!**/*.d.ts' '!**/*.tsbuildinfo'
scripts.check:static: bun run check:declarative-errors && bun run lint && bun run format:check
scripts.check: bun run check:static && bun run typecheck && bun run typecheck:test
